summary: First iteration testing complete. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical UI flows tested and working correctly. Login, role-based dashboards, and navigation all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend API structure is clean and well-organized
✅ JWT authentication properly implemented with role-based access control
✅ All endpoints have proper error handling and status codes
✅ Frontend uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ API integration uses environment variables correctly
✅ Auth token storage has web fallback (localStorage) for expo-secure-store
✅ MongoDB ObjectId (_id) is properly excluded from API responses
Minor: expo-secure-store import was causing web errors - fixed with conditional require
seed_data_creation: Backend seed data already created by server.py on startup. 10 sample leads with GPS coordinates, 4 handlowiec users assigned to manager, goals set for each rep.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality tested and working. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend login, dashboards (manager/rep/admin), and navigation tested with Playwright. Expo tunnel had initial connectivity issues but stabilized after restart. The app is mobile-first (React Native) served via web preview - all components render correctly on mobile viewport (390x844).

auth_tests.test_login_admin_success: ✅ PASSED - Returns access_token and user with role=admin
auth_tests.test_auth_me_with_token: ✅ PASSED - Returns user data with Bearer token

settings_tests.test_get_settings: ✅ PASSED - Returns settings with base_price_low=275, excluded_zip_codes includes 77-400, Santander RRSO=10.75
settings_tests.test_update_settings_as_admin: ✅ PASSED - Admin can update settings, changes persist

dashboard_tests.test_manager_dashboard: ✅ PASSED - Returns kpi, status_breakdown (with all 5 statuses), rep_progress (>0 entries), top3, pins, total_leads
dashboard_tests.test_rep_dashboard: ✅ PASSED - Returns total_leads, signed, meetings, target, percent

leads_tests.test_get_leads_as_handlowiec: ✅ PASSED - Returns only leads assigned to that user
leads_tests.test_get_leads_as_manager: ✅ PASSED - Returns leads assigned to manager's reps
leads_tests.test_create_lead_as_handlowiec: ✅ PASSED - Creates lead with assigned_to=self, verified persistence

users_tests.test_register_as_admin: ✅ PASSED - Admin can create new user, user can login
users_tests.test_get_users_as_manager: ✅ PASSED - Returns own team + self (4+ users)
users_tests.test_delete_user_as_admin: ✅ PASSED - Admin can delete user, verified user cannot login after deletion

login_screen.renders: ✅ PASSED - Login screen loads with title 'Zaloguj się'
login_screen.quick_login_buttons: ✅ PASSED - All 3 quick login buttons present (Admin, Manager, Handlowiec)
login_screen.email_password_inputs: ✅ PASSED - Email and password input fields present with testIDs

manager_dashboard.login_and_routing: ✅ PASSED - Manager login successful, routes to /(manager)
manager_dashboard.kpi_tiles: ✅ PASSED - All 4 KPI tiles present (Spotkania, Nowe leady, Wyceny, Aktywni w terenie)
manager_dashboard.sections: ✅ PASSED - All sections present (Cele i postęp, Statusy leadów, Top 3, Lead Map)
manager_dashboard.progress_bars: ✅ PASSED - Rep progress section shows multiple reps with progress bars
manager_dashboard.status_donut: ✅ PASSED - Status breakdown donut chart visible
manager_dashboard.lead_map: ✅ PASSED - Lead Map section visible (web fallback list view)

handlowiec_home.login_and_routing: ✅ PASSED - Handlowiec login successful, routes to /(rep)
handlowiec_home.work_mode_button: ✅ PASSED - Start/Stop work mode button present and tappable
handlowiec_home.action_buttons: ✅ PASSED - All action buttons present (Dodaj leada, Generator ofert OZE, Moje leady)
handlowiec_home.results_card: ✅ PASSED - Moje wyniki card visible with metrics (Podpisane, Spotkania, Leady)
handlowiec_home.goal_progress: ✅ PASSED - Monthly goal progress bar visible with percentage

admin_home.login_and_routing: ✅ PASSED - Admin login successful, routes to /(admin)
admin_home.admin_tiles: ✅ PASSED - All 3 admin tiles present (Ustawienia globalne, Użytkownicy, Centrum Dowodzenia)
admin_home.navigation: ✅ PASSED - Tiles are tappable with proper testIDs

auth_flow.logout: ✅ PASSED - Logout button works, returns to login screen
auth_flow.role_switching: ✅ PASSED - Can switch between different roles via logout/login

notes.expo_tunnel_issue: Initial Expo tunnel (ngrok) had connectivity issues causing 'preview environment not responding' errors. Fixed by restarting Expo service. This is an infrastructure issue, not an app bug.
notes.expo_secure_store_fix: Fixed expo-secure-store import to use conditional require() for web compatibility. The module was being imported on web where it's not available, causing errors. Now uses localStorage fallback correctly.
notes.mobile_viewport: All frontend tests used mobile viewport (390x844) as this is a React Native app. Components render correctly for mobile.
notes.shadow_deprecation: Console shows 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings. This is a React Native Web deprecation warning, not a critical issue.
notes.maps_on_web: react-native-maps is native-only. Web preview shows list fallback as designed. This is expected behavior.
notes.test_data_cleanup: Backend tests create test users with TEST_ prefix and timestamp for uniqueness. Some test data remains in DB but doesn't affect functionality.
